title: The ONLY 6 Skills You Need to 10x Your Claude Projects
summary: Austin Marchese outlines six core Claude skills for 10x project improvement: web scraping for data discovery, knowledge base ingestion, system improvement iteration, advisory workflows, testing before release, and compound engineering for shipping. The methodology is demonstrated through building a personal fitness trainer project.
